tools.name: save_appointment
tools.description: Register a meeting in my calendar.
examples: I have a meeting next monday with Job Doe.
Save my doctor appointment for the 23/10/2026.

tools.name: read_ios
tools.description: Read signals on IO to have access to sensors mesures.
examples: Give me the temperature in your room.
I want all the measure you can get.

tools.name: ask_llm
tools.description: Send a text to the LLM model used by the agent.

text.description: Text from the user we want to send to the model

examples: Ask the llm this : Can you write me a short Whatsapp message to demand more details about this subject
Give to the llm that : Make a function with float input and int16_t output that compute Q15 representation
